basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website https://www.iitr.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Project Associate Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Roorkee recruitment is Project Associate. This is a contractual position offered by the institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate post at IIT Roorkee. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech or B.E. degree in Chemical or Mechanical Engineering to be eligible for the Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate role will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with their documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Associate position is scheduled for 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee, Roorkee, Uttarakhand, 247667.
